arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola calls on Kevin De Bruyne to be 'honest with himself' as Man City midfielder mulls his future ahead of his contract expiry
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN: City's boss confirmed Mail Sport's story that De Bruyne - out of contract at the end of the season - will be afforded the opportunity to decide his next move after a decade at the club.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou defends Mathys Tel after his slow start at Tottenham - as he insists the Bayern Munich loanee has 'so much growth in him'
arts.sum: Tel has scored once since signing from Bayern Munich on deadline day and shown flickers of promise, but Postecoglou expects the teenager to truly flourish over time.

arts.ttl: De Bruyne will be ‘honest’ over future as Manchester City contract expires
arts.sum: Deal runs out in summer and no extension talks held Guardiola: ‘He’s 34 in summer and has to decide’ Kevin De Bruyne will be “honest with himself” when making a decision about his future, according to Pep Guardiola. The 33-year-old midfielder is out of contract at Manchester City in the summer and is yet to enter formal talks over an extension. De Bruyne has become a bit-part player this season as his body struggles to cope with the rigours of elite football. He endured a difficult afternoon against Liverpool on Sunday and is unlikely to start at Tottenham on Wednesday night. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: AC Milan in discussions with ex-Juventus and Spurs director for key role.
Report: Ange Postecoglou losing patience with 'inconsistent' £35m Tottenham player, could soon be offloaded
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have been busy in the past few transfer windows and there could be more of the same this coming summer. Ange Postecoglou has...

arts.ttl: Man City predicted lineup vs Tottenham - Premier League
arts.sum: Predicting Man City's starting lineup for their Premier League clash against Tottenham Hotspur on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Tottenham predicted lineup vs Man City - Premier League
arts.sum: Predicted Tottenham lineup for their Premier League clash against Man City on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Pep Guardiola DEMANDS €100m Jamie Gittens signing
arts.sum: Real Madrid are also interested in signing the 20-year-old, despite their current attacking riches, but they could miss out on a deal as Guardiola has ordered Man City to “pay whatever they have to pay to sign him.” Pep Guardiola has ordered Manchester City to pay whatever it takes to re-sign Borussia Dortmund winger Jamie Gittens, according to a sensational report from Spain.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland facing late fitness test ahead of Tottenham clash
arts.sum: Erling Haaland returned to Man City training ahead of the Premier League clash with Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs. Man City: What English football feat could the Lilywhites set against the Premier League champions?
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have the opportunity to create a new English footballing record when they face Manchester City in the Premier League on Wednesday.
